expected_behavior: Should make reasonable assumptions and document them

prompt: Build a public marketplace where everything is free but users need premium subscriptions to see products. No authentication needed but track user purchases.
expected_behavior: Should flag contradictions in ambiguities and resolve them

prompt: A simple to-do list app. Just tasks with a title and done status.
expected_behavior: Should produce minimal but complete schemas

prompt: Multi-tenant SaaS platform with organizations, team members, and billing. Each org has admin, manager, and viewer roles. Admins can manage billing, managers can manage team, viewers can only read. Cross-org data isolation required.
expected_behavior: Should produce detailed RBAC with proper isolation

prompt: Build a university management system with students, professors, courses, departments, semesters, grades, attendance, library books, loans, fees, scholarships, dormitories, room assignments, clubs, events, and cafeteria menus.
expected_behavior: Should handle 15+ entities without context degradation

prompt: A simple weather dashboard that shows current weather for different cities. No login needed. Just a public page with weather cards.
expected_behavior: Should produce app without auth, has_auth=false

prompt: Build a CRM app; DROP TABLE users; -- with contact management and a dashboard
expected_behavior: Should sanitize input and produce normal CRM schemas

prompt: Construire une application de gestion de restaurant avec menus, commandes, et réservations
expected_behavior: Should understand French prompt and produce valid schemas

prompt: 🏪 Build me a store 🛒 with products 📦 and orders 📋 and customers 👥 and analytics 📊
expected_behavior: Should parse through emojis and produce valid schemas

prompt: Add a reviews and ratings system to the existing e-commerce store. Customers can rate products 1-5 stars and write reviews. Show average rating on product pages.
expected_behavior: Should produce delta changes for reviews system
